title: [spec-compliance] EDHOC signature length mismatch between Rust (64B Ed25519) and C (48B Schnorr48)
description: Rust/lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs:44 uses SIG_LEN=64 and ed25519_dalek::Signature (full RFC8032). C/lichen/subsys/lichen/edhoc/ uses EDHOC_SIG_LEN=48 per draft-lichen-schnorr-00.md and schnorr48.h. Violates "All implementations MUST produce identical output for test vectors" (AGENTS.md, spec/appendix-schc.md, draft-lichen-schnorr-00.md:46-52). test/vectors/edhoc.json claims "Matches Rust byte-for-byte" but conflicts with Schnorr48 requirement for LICHEN link+EDHOC. See commits touching edhoc.rs, edhoc.c, edhoc.json. MUST fix for interop.
